metadata.title: Short links
metadata.description: An Obsidian plugin to display short internal links.

regex.source: .setDesc("Only show the file name in links to files.")
.setDesc("Only show the last heading name in links to headings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("只显示链接到标题的最后一个标题名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show all heading names in links to headings.")
.setDesc("Show the hash at the start of links to headings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在链接到标题的开头显示哈希符号。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Only show the block name in links to blocks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("只显示块的名称而不显示链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the caret at the start of links to blocks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示链接块的起始位置指示符")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show icons to indicate the type of internal link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示图标以指示内部链接的类型。")

regex.source: .setDesc("For consistency, replace the default icon used for external links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("外部链接的默认图标，请使用统一的图标。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set whether icons are show at the start or end of links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置链接在开头还是结尾显示图标。")
